prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Forecast remaining useful life for transformer T-016 and state whether it can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report an RUL estimate in days, compare it against the 180-day horizon, and provide a clear maintenance recommendation.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [tsfm] get_rul — Get the current RUL estimate for transformer T-016
  Step 2: [tsfm] forecast_rul — Forecast the RUL for transformer T-016 for the next 180 days (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [tsfm] none — Determine if transformer T-016 can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Assess the current health status of transformer T-016 based on the provided RUL estimate and determine the need for maintenance.
  Step 5: [iot] list_sensors — Evaluate the sensor data for transformer T-016 to identify potential issues. (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-016. (depends on steps [4])
  Step 7: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA data to diagnose potential faults in transformer T-016. (depends on steps [6])
  Step 8: [wo] estimate_downtime — Estimate the expected downtime for maintenance on transformer T-016. (depends on steps [7])
  Step 9: [wo] create_work_order — Create a new maintenance work order for transformer T-016. (depends on steps [8])
  Step 10: [wo] update_work_order — Update the work order status to reflect the planned maintenance. (depends on steps [9])
  Step 11: [tsfm] forecast_rul — Forecast the remaining useful life for transformer T-016 for the next 180 days to determine if it can safely operate without major maintenance.
  Step 12: [iot] none — Evaluate the forecasted RUL to determine if transformer T-016 can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance. (depends on steps [11])
  Step 13: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-016 to support maintenance planning.
  Step 14: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA data to diagnose potential faults in transformer T-016 and inform maintenance planning. (depends on steps [13])
  Step 15: [wo] estimate_downtime — Estimate the expected downtime for maintenance on transformer T-016 based on its severity and fault type. (depends on steps [14])
  Step 16: [wo] create_work_order — Create a new maintenance work order for transformer T-016 with the estimated downtime and priority. (depends on steps [15])
  Step 17: [wo] update_work_order — Update the work order status to reflect the planned maintenance and assign a technician. (depends on steps [16])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)

  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Get the current RUL estimate for transformer T-016",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "get_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-016"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 57,\n  \"health_index\": 0.0522,\n  \"fdd_category\": 4,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Degraded \\u2014 maintenance recommended within 30 days.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "replan_suffix",
    "verifier_reason": "RUL estimate is lower than required safe operation period",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "Assess maintenance options for transformer T-016",
    "retries_used": 0,

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the forecasted remaining useful life, transformer T-016 is not expected to safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance, as its projected RUL days are 0, indicating a high likelihood of failure within that timeframe.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
